data.title: Belgian Boys relaunches heart-shaped Love Bites pancakes, selling out last year, expanding in Texas with a hot-pink food truck tour.
data.description: Belgian Boys, a women-led company famous for its European-inspired refrigerated products, has brought back the seasonal heart-shaped pancakes due to overwhelming demand. The popular pancakes, which sold out last year, are making a comeback and are being accompanied by a vibrant hot-pink food truck tour. This tour is part of the company's celebration of its growth in Texas. The exciting initiative was announced on January 14, 2026, in Brooklyn, New York. The company's expansion and the return of the heart-shaped pancakes have generated much excitement among fans and food enthusiasts alike.

data.title: Fibocom launches global LTE Cat.1 bis module LE271-GL for IoT devices, providing single-SKU global connectivity.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on January 14, 2026, Fibocom (stock symbols: 300638.SZ and 0638.HK), a renowned company in wireless communication modules and edge AI solutions, unveiled the release of its latest product, the global LTE Cat.1 bis module named LE271-GL. This innovation aims to offer IoT devices worldwide connectivity through a single-SKU solution. This launch signifies Fibocom's commitment to advancing in the field of wireless communication and providing efficient solutions for IoT connectivity.

data.title: Stirlingshire Investments hires new senior advisor managing $850 million in assets under management.
data.description: Stirlingshire Investments, a Fintech BD/RIA Platform in New York, has disclosed that a senior financial advisor managing around $850 million in assets under management (AUM) is officially joining their platform. This advisor's practice is now onboarded with Stirlingshire Investments as of today.
US Secretary of War Hegseth to host Japanese Defence minister on January 15th.

data.title: Bitnomial introduces US-regulated futures market for Aptos, boosting its presence in CFTC-regulated derivatives with altcoin futures.
data.description: Aptos has broadened its presence in CFTC-regulated derivatives markets through a recent launch, supplementing Bitnomial’s range of altcoin futures as demand for such assets increases among investors. This move signifies an increase in Bitnomial’s offerings and represents Aptos’ expansion in the derivatives markets overseen by the CFTC. It reflects the growing trend in investor interest towards altcoins, showcasing the companies’ efforts to meet the rising demand for alternative cryptocurrency investment options.

data.title: Wesleyan Impact Partners gets $5 million grant from Lilly Endowment for "All the Good You Can" campaign.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Wesleyan Impact Partners has been awarded a $5 million grant from the Eli Lilly Endowment. This funding will support the "All the Good You Can" campaign, aimed at sharing stories of Christian faith.
the vote to pass a draft resolution extending the monthly reporting requirement on Houthi attacks in the Red Sea.

data.title: CU Anschutz to host 2nd annual COACmH Conference in Feb 2026 at Anschutz Medical Campus, advancing mental health in athletics.
data.description: In Aurora, Colorado, the CU Anschutz Helen and Arthur E. Johnson Depression Center will be organizing the second annual Coalition of Athletic Communities for Mental Health (COACmH) Conference on the Anschutz Medical Campus. The event is scheduled to take place from February 17-19, 2026. This conference is focused on promoting mental health within athletic communities and will bring together professionals, athletes, and experts to discuss important issues in this field.

data.title: U.S. Money Reserve celebrates Ryan Buchanan's 20th anniversary as CCO, highlighting visionary leadership.
data.description: Celebrating its 20th anniversary, U.S. Money Reserve, a leading private distributor of physical precious metals, based in Austin, Texas, recognizes Chief Creative Officer Ryan Buchanan for his visionary leadership over the past two decades. This milestone signifies Buchanan's long-standing dedication and contribution to the company's success.

data.title: Bitwarden enhances security for 2026 with new features: enterprise capabilities, passkey innovation, and AI workflows.Characters: 97
data.description: In Santa Barbara, California, Bitwarden, a prominent figure in password and secrets management, revealed advancements in product innovation and ecosystem growth aimed at enhancing identity security for individuals and businesses. Bitwarden unveiled new features including enterprise credential risk insights and guided remediation through Bitwarden Access Intelligence. Additionally, the company expanded passkey compatibility across various browsers, devices, and operating systems. The efforts also included a further alignment with industry standards, demonstrating Bitwarden's commitment to improving security practices.

data.title: SailGP and CBS Sports extend TV rights for 2026-2027 seasons with over 50 hours of coverage per season.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 14, 2026, SailGP and CBS Sports have confirmed an extension of their U.S. television agreement for a span of two years. This groundbreaking agreement marks the first multi-year deal for SailGP in the United States. Under this extension, viewers can expect over 50 hours of coverage per season, providing extensive access to the thrilling racing action on water.

data.title: Korcomptenz wins 2025 Stevie Award for Best CSR Strategy in Great Employers category, recognizing their dedication to CSR.
data.description: In Parsippany, New Jersey, on January 14, 2026, Korcomptenz, a leading global digital transformation and technology services firm, was declared the recipient of the 2025 Stevie® Award for Best CSR Strategy in the Great Employers division. This prestigious award acknowledges Korcomptenz's effective corporate social responsibility initiatives.

data.title: SkinSpirit opens fourth clinic in partnership with Nordstrom in Topanga, California, expanding its footprint in 2026.
data.description: SkinSpirit and Nordstrom are celebrating the opening of their fourth location in Topanga, California. Known for being a top provider of BOTOX® Cosmetic and dermal fillers in the United States, SkinSpirit has expanded its reach with this new clinic. The inauguration took place on January 14, 2026. This partnership signifies a strong commitment to providing quality skincare services.

data.title: PANTHEON.tech integrates gNMI in OpenDaylight project for telcos, bridging open-source innovation with enterprise reliability.
data.description: In Bratislava, Slovakia, PANTHEON.tech recently incorporated gNMI into OpenDaylight, a widely utilized open-source initiative in the realm of open networking, renowned among leading telecommunication corporations for its efficacy.

data.title: Missouri's ToRCH program, in partnership with Unite Us, shows measurable ROI for rural health with positive outcomes.
data.description: Unite Us, a leading technology partner in health and community care integration, recently shared findings from an assessment of Missouri's ToRCH program. With backing from Missouri Medicaid and utilizing Unite Us technology, the ToRCH initiative showcased the effectiveness of hospital-driven community care coordination. This program showcases the ability to enhance health results, diminish expenses, and alleviate administrative challenges, aiding residents across the state in achieving better wellness.

data.title: Gerri Martin-Flickinger appointed Chair of Renaissance's Board to drive innovation in education tech. Jan 14, 2026.
data.description: Experienced tech leader Gerri Martin-Flickinger has been appointed as Chair of the Board at Renaissance, a top player in pre-K–12 education tech. The announcement was made on Jan. 14, 2026, in Bloomington, Minn. Martin-Flickinger will play a key role in steering Renaissance's future innovations in education technology.

data.title: Boats Group adds new Performance Insights Reports in BoatWizard to provide real-time data for better digital marketing.
data.description: Boats Group unveiled upgraded Performance Insights Reports in BoatWizard on January 14, 2026, providing clear, real-time insights from brokers and dealers to facilitate better understanding of digital marketing strategies. This development aims to simplify decision-making processes by offering crucial data for analysis and action.
